name: Mulberry Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Put mulberries in a saucepan and crush gently.
2. Heat the mixture until juice starts to flow, then simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
3. Squeeze the jelly cloth or bag to extract the juice.
4. Measure 3 cups of the extracted juice into a large saucepan.
5. Add lemon juice and sugar, stirring well.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
7. Stir in pectin at once.
8. Boil hard for 1 minute, ensuring it reaches a full rolling boil.
9. Remove from heat, skim off foam with a metal spoon.
10. Pour quickly into sterilized jars and seal.
11. This yields about eight 1/2-pint jars.
Caution: The juice may cause staining.
